title: Nobel laureate Omar Yaghi moves to Tsinghua to lead an AI materials-discovery institute
summary: Omar Yaghi (2025 Chemistry Nobel; the pioneer of metal-organic frameworks) has left UC Berkeley for a full-time chair at Tsinghua University in Beijing, where he will lead a new AI-assisted materials-discovery institute. A high-profile US-to-China move on exactly the frontier DiscoveryLabNL is building for.
